title: デビュー戦の後に・カワイイよ広がれ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan makes her debut without any
trouble. Her social media is flooded with
comments, and she enjoys all of the support. Her
happiness doesn't last long, though...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On closer inspection, the majority of her fans
aren't interested in her running. It's now clear to
Curren Chan that she needs to increase the
attention on her races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Instead of deciding on a short-term race goal,
Curren Chan decides to work on increasing her
profile and name recognition while continuing to
train.
